category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-New Zealand EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入新西兰：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入紐西蘭：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against New Zealand WorkSafe / Energy Safety expectations, RCM and EESS-style electrical product evidence, AS/NZS 3000 wiring rules, AS/NZS IEC 61851 safety standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2 connector direction, 230/400 V 50 Hz grid conditions, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与新西兰WorkSafe / Energy Safety要求、RCM及EESS式电气产品证据、AS/NZS 3000布线规则、AS/NZS IEC 61851安全标准、IEC 62196 Type 2及CCS2接口方向、230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與紐西蘭WorkSafe / Energy Safety要求、RCM及EESS式電氣產品證據、AS/NZS 3000布線規則、AS/NZS IEC 61851安全標準、IEC 62196 Type 2及CCS2接口方向、230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, WorkSafe determination, electrical-installation design, customs determination, network-connection approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current New Zealand electrical safety law, RCM / EESS evidence expectations, AS/NZS wiring rules, connector requirements, and site installation obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、WorkSafe裁定、电气安装设计、海关裁定、电网接入批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行新西兰电气安全法律、RCM / EESS证据要求、AS/NZS布线规则、接口要求及现场安装义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、WorkSafe裁定、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、電網接入批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行紐西蘭電氣安全法律、RCM / EESS證據要求、AS/NZS布線規則、接口要求及現場安裝義務。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering New Zealand, the practical gaps are WorkSafe / Energy Safety electrical product evidence, RCM / EESS-style compliance records, installation under the Electricity (Safety) Regulations 2010 by a licensed New Zealand electrician, compatibility with New Zealand's 230/400 V 50 Hz supply and AS/NZS 3000 wiring rules, and hardware redesign from China GB/T 20234 connectors to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC. GB/T connector chargers are physically incompatible with the New Zealand direction and cannot be fixed by paperwork alone.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入新西兰时，实务差距包括：WorkSafe / Energy Safety电气产品证据；RCM / EESS式合规记录；依据《2010年电气（安全）法规》由新西兰持证电工安装；兼容新西兰230/400 V、50 Hz供电和AS/NZS 3000布线规则；并将中国GB/T 20234接口硬件改为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口充电桩与新西兰方向存在物理不兼容，不能仅靠文件解决。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入紐西蘭時，實務差距包括：WorkSafe / Energy Safety電氣產品證據；RCM / EESS式合規記錄；依據《2010年電氣（安全）法規》由紐西蘭持證電工安裝；相容紐西蘭230/400 V、50 Hz供電和AS/NZS 3000布線規則；並將中國GB/T 20234接口硬體改為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口充電樁與紐西蘭方向存在物理不相容，不能僅靠文件解決。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, accredited body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
